title: Building Studios for Faculty
summary: A Digital Born essay on building instructional studio infrastructure for faculty work at scale.

lensSummary.overview: A public artifact about academic media infrastructure built for real institutional use.
lensSummary.builder: Focused on implementation under pressure: hardware, workflows, and service design in the same frame.
lensSummary.leader: Shows institution-scale delivery across teams, media systems, and operational constraints.
lensSummary.scholar: Documents how teaching media systems become part of institutional culture and pedagogy.
lensSummary.hiring: A strong public signal of leadership in academic technology and media operations.

title: Kaltura API Metadata Interface
summary: A PHP tool for updating custom Kaltura metadata through the API rather than manual interface work.

lensSummary.overview: A systems-facing utility for media-platform metadata work.
lensSummary.builder: Useful because it turns a repetitive platform task into a scriptable process.
lensSummary.leader: Represents platform operations translated into tooling instead of manual labor.
lensSummary.scholar: Metadata becomes visible here as an infrastructural layer in media systems.
lensSummary.hiring: Shows practical API fluency in support of operational platform work.

title: Excel Web Services and POST Requests
summary: A writeup on using Excel and Power BI against REST endpoints in a less-common POST-based workflow.

lensSummary.overview: A practical systems note about connecting business tools to APIs.
lensSummary.builder: Focused on making everyday platforms do more through direct API work.
lensSummary.leader: Shows a habit of translating technical integrations into clearer operational patterns.
lensSummary.scholar: Makes visible the hidden infrastructural links between office software and networked data.
lensSummary.hiring: Evidence of technical problem-solving that improves applied data workflows.

title: Power over Ethernet for Amazon Echo Show 15
summary: A build note about solving visible power and installation constraints with a PoE hardware path.

lensSummary.overview: A compact hardware build that solves a specific systems problem cleanly.
lensSummary.builder: Directly about materials, wiring constraints, and making an object work in a real setting.
lensSummary.leader: A reminder that practical making sharpens technical judgment at larger scales.
lensSummary.scholar: Small infrastructural objects also carry design choices and social assumptions.
lensSummary.hiring: Signals hands-on fluency rather than architecture detached from implementation.

title: WP REST API Post Getter
summary: A JavaScript utility for displaying posts from a WordPress site on an external site through the REST API.

lensSummary.overview: A small publishing utility that moves content between systems without a full CMS tie-in.
lensSummary.builder: A straightforward example of building a useful bridge between platforms.
lensSummary.leader: Shows a preference for lightweight, maintainable tooling over heavyweight integration layers.
lensSummary.scholar: Interesting as a small publishing-system connector: archive, interface, and distribution in one move.
lensSummary.hiring: A practical API artifact with public reuse and real utility.

title: LaTeX Beamer Lightboard Template
summary: A Beamer template and instructions for producing Lightboard presentation materials more cleanly.

lensSummary.overview: A focused production tool for teaching-media workflows.
lensSummary.builder: Turns presentation production into a repeatable technical template rather than a one-off process.
lensSummary.leader: A good example of making support practice more scalable through tooling.
lensSummary.scholar: A small teaching-media object where form, workflow, and pedagogy meet.
lensSummary.hiring: Signals practical tool-building in service of media production and education.

title: CrankGPT
summary: A DIY Jetson Orin Nano kiosk that runs a local LLM, measures answer energy use, and makes you hand-crank that energy to unlock the response.

lensSummary.overview: An AI object that is simultaneously prototype, interface, and argument.
lensSummary.builder: A strong example of hardware, software, and interaction design locked to one concept.
lensSummary.leader: Shows experimentation with AI that still has a disciplined point of view and physical implementation.
lensSummary.scholar: Probably the clearest studio artifact here: computation used as cultural critique and interface form.
lensSummary.hiring: Distinctive evidence of technical range, design judgment, and conceptual ambition.

title: OpenSearch API Autocomplete
summary: An interface experiment using Wikipedia data and the OpenSearch API to drive autocomplete behavior.

lensSummary.overview: A compact interface experiment centered on search and suggestion.
lensSummary.builder: The interesting part is the direct use of external data to shape interaction behavior.
lensSummary.leader: Shows product-style thinking applied to a small but complete interface slice.
lensSummary.scholar: Search behavior becomes visible here as a cultural and interface problem, not only a technical one.
lensSummary.hiring: Useful evidence of front-end experimentation with data-backed interaction.

title: TNTP Staff Theme
summary: A WordPress theme project that sits close to interface systems, publishing structure, and visual implementation.

lensSummary.overview: A theme artifact where interface structure and presentation are the work.
lensSummary.builder: Shows theme work as a concrete blend of PHP, templates, and front-end decisions.
lensSummary.leader: Useful as evidence of shaping publishing systems through the interface layer itself.
lensSummary.scholar: Themes are small publishing environments, not just skins, and this makes that visible.
lensSummary.hiring: A practical design-and-implementation artifact rather than abstract design talk.

title: Digital Born
summary: The main writing publication: the essay and notes archive that anchors the Writing track.

lensSummary.overview: The primary writing publication tied to the rest of the practice.
lensSummary.builder: A place where implementation details, history, and interpretation meet.
lensSummary.leader: Writing that translates complex technical and organizational work into usable language.
lensSummary.scholar: The strongest through-line for digital humanities and software-studies adjacent work.
lensSummary.hiring: Demonstrates communication range, editorial discipline, and conceptual depth.

title: Converting Books to JSON
summary: A Digital Born post about scanning, cleaning, and structuring publishing directories as machine-readable JSON.

lensSummary.overview: A writing artifact that also reads as a workflow and data-conversion case study.
lensSummary.builder: Moves from print source material to structured data through scripts, cleanup, and extraction logic.
lensSummary.leader: Shows the ability to explain a multi-stage technical process clearly to a broader audience.
lensSummary.scholar: Strongly aligned with archives, publishing history, and digital humanities method.
lensSummary.hiring: A concrete artifact where technical implementation and communication are both visible.

title: WP eBookit
summary: A WordPress plugin project focused on ebook publishing and format transformation inside a publishing workflow.

lensSummary.overview: A publishing-system artifact rather than a pure essay, but central to the writing track’s infrastructure side.
lensSummary.builder: Interesting because it treats publishing as software behavior and output formatting.
lensSummary.leader: Shows the instinct to formalize publishing needs as reusable tooling.
lensSummary.scholar: Connects writing practice to the systems and formats that make writing travel.
lensSummary.hiring: Good evidence of applying software thinking directly to publishing problems.
